svg.title: Selection scan Manhattan plot
svg.desc: Manhattan plot of iHS-derived -log10(p) values across 22 autosomes. Each dot is one SNP; colour alternates cobalt and grey between successive chromosomes. Most SNPs cluster at low values; four tall peaks above the genome-wide significance line at 7.3 are annotated with known selection-targeted loci: LCT and EDAR on chromosome 2, SLC24A5 on chromosome 15, and ABCC11 on chromosome 16.
svg.text: SELECTION SCAN · iHS MANHATTAN PLOT · KNOWN POSITIVE-SELECTION TARGETS

g.text: Peaks are candidate sweeps · iHS detects long, low-diversity haplotypes around a nearly-fixed derived allele
the four labelled loci are famous validated targets of recent human positive selection
